events.fact: Grandpa Bud rebuilds the crafting station to ensure it is no longer considered 'exposed' by the game.
Encountered and killed a skeleton in the Meadows, obtaining bone fragments.
Discovered a Viking boat burial stone formation while exploring the coastline.
Located a wild beehive and harvested a queen bee using a bow.
Constructed a third beehive at the base.
Crafted leather trousers and a leather tunic.
Upgraded the crude bow to level 2 and the wood shield to level 2.
Upgraded the flint axe to level 2.
Successfully led a one-star boar and a zero-star boar into a constructed pen at the base.
Began the taming process for the captured boars by feeding them mushrooms and raspberries.
Constructed a fourth beehive at the base.
Discovered a Burial Chamber dungeon in the Black Forest biome.
Defeated a one-star skeleton inside the Burial Chamber.
Obtained the first Surtling Cores, unlocking the Smelter and Charcoal Kiln recipes.
Interacted with a Vegvisir inside the dungeon, marking the location of the second boss, The Elder, on the map.
Collected a total of five Surtling Cores from the Burial Chamber.
Escaped the Black Forest at night while being pursued by a Troll and a Greydwarf Shaman.
Crafted a Deer Hide Cape.
Discovered an 'Arena' structure in the Meadows containing a skeleton spawner.
Hunted and killed two one-star deer, obtaining eight deer hides.
Built a Tanning Rack, upgrading the Workbench to level 3.
Upgraded the leather tunic, leather trousers, and leather helmet to level 2.
